heading: Support
label: 3200 Support
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the first full program year after (), see , set out as a note under .July 22, 2014July 1, 2015section 506 of Pub. L. 113–128section 3101 of this title

children.heading: Personal allowances
children.label: a Personal allowances
children.text: The Secretary may provide enrollees assigned to Job Corps centers with such personal allowances as the Secretary may determine to be necessary or appropriate to meet the needs of the enrollees.

children.heading: Transition allowances
children.label: b Transition allowances
children.text: The Secretary shall arrange for a transition allowance to be paid to graduates. The transition allowance shall be incentive-based to reflect a graduate’s completion of academic, career and technical education or training, and attainment of recognized postsecondary credentials.

children.heading: Transition support
children.label: c Transition support
children.text: The Secretary may arrange for the provision of 3 months of employment services for former enrollees.
